metadata.title: Teoman Kirma • Fullstack Developer
metadata.description: Fullstack developer building scalable web apps and distributed systems, from UI to infrastructure. Based in Izmir, Türkiye.

hero.name: Teoman Kirma
hero.tagline: I build performant interfaces and reliable backends, end to end.

about.heading: About
about.bodyA: I'm a Full-Stack Developer building scalable web applications and distributed systems. On the frontend, I work with React, Next.js, and TypeScript to create performant and accessible user interfaces. On the backend, I design and implement APIs using Python and Node.js, working with databases, background jobs, and system reliability patterns.
about.bodyB: I enjoy building systems end-to-end, from UI to infrastructure, with a strong focus on performance, maintainability, and clean architecture.

portfolio.heading: Selected Work
portfolio.subtitle: A selection of projects I would like to showcase.

atm.description: Sign up or sign in, then deposit and withdraw money. You can also change your password after logging in.

keeper.description: A website where you can create new notes and delete existing ones.

quizApp.description: A Vite-powered quiz with configurable sessions, Open Trivia DB questions, persistent leaderboards, and optional motivational quotes via API Ninjas.

mongodbCrud.description: A minimal Express + MongoDB app powering a theme-park reservations dashboard with REST flows for onboarding, saved cards, and ticket pricing.

teoAi.description: A Prismic-powered marketing site for teo.ai with animated hero storytelling, case studies, integrations, and a managed login funnel on Next.js App Router.

productListing.description: Upload product photos, the AI analyzes them, asks follow-ups, and generates pricing suggestions and ready-to-use marketplace listings you refine through chat.

jobFlow.description: A distributed background job system: enqueue tasks via an API and monitor execution in real time, with retries, idempotency, rate limiting, and dead-letter queues.

cirkle.description: A community marketplace platform where people spin up focused marketplaces for their apartment, university, company, or neighborhood. Features AI-assisted listing creation from a photo or product URL. No commissions, no middleman.

clueClash.description: A team-based word association party game played across multiple phones at once. Race to identify hidden words from one-word clues within 45 seconds while dodging the danger tile. Fast clues, loud guesses, total chaos.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.pitch: Have a project in mind or just want to say hi? Send me a note.

toast.notConfiguredDescription: EmailJS environment variables are missing. Please set them in .env.local.
toast.successDescription: Thanks! I will get back to you soon.
toast.failedDescription: Unable to send your message. Please try again later.

validation.name_max: Name must be at most 100 characters
validation.email_max: Email must be at most 254 characters

validation.message_max: Message must be at most 2000 characters
